query:
ALTER TABLE after_sales_services 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS brand ENUM('MARKET_SPAS','WELLIS_CLASSIC','WELLIS_LIFE','WELLIS_WIBES','PASSION_SPAS','PLATINUM_SPAS') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS productLine VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS modelName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS component VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS defectType VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS purchaseDate DATE NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS deliveryDate DATE NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS usageType ENUM('PRIVATE','COMMERCIAL','HOLIDAY_LET') DEFAULT 'PRIVATE',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isOriginalBuyer BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isModified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isMaintenanceConform BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isChemistryConform BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS usesHydrogenPeroxide BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS warrantyStatus ENUM('COVERED','PARTIAL','EXPIRED','EXCLUDED','REVIEW_NEEDED') DEFAULT 'REVIEW_NEEDED',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS warrantyPercentage INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS warrantyExpiryDate DATE NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS warrantyAnalysisDetails TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS adminWarrantyOverride BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS adminWarrantyNotes TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shippingCost DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalAmount DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripePaymentIntentId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paidAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trackingNumber VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trackingCarrier ENUM('BPOST','DHL','UPS','GLS','MONDIAL_RELAY','OTHER') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trackingUrl VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shippedAt TIMESTAMP NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute 
ALTER TABLE after_sales_services 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS brand ENUM('MARKET_SPAS','WELLIS_CLASSIC','WELLIS_LIFE','WELLIS_WIBES','PASSION_SPAS','PLATINUM_SPAS') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS productLine VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS modelName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS component VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS defectType VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS purchaseDate DATE NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS deliveryDate DATE NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS usageType ENUM('PRIVATE','COMMERCIAL','HOLIDAY_LET') DEFAULT 'PRIVATE',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isOriginalBuyer BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isModified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isMaintenanceConform BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isChemistryConform BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS usesHydrogenPeroxide BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS warrantyStatus ENUM('COVERED','PARTIAL','EXPIRED','EXCLUDED','REVIEW_NEEDED') DEFAULT 'REVIEW_NEEDED',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS warrantyPercentage INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS warrantyExpiryDate DATE NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS warrantyAnalysisDetails TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS adminWarrantyOverride BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS adminWarrantyNotes TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shippingCost DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalAmount DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripePaymentIntentId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paidAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trackingNumber VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trackingCarrier ENUM('BPOST','DHL','UPS','GLS','MONDIAL_RELAY','OTHER') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trackingUrl VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shippedAt TIMESTAMP NULL;
